overall.description: Third-person gameplay from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a scenic rural landscape. The character travels from an open grassy meadow past a wooden farmhouse, through forested terrain, and along a lakeside path with a distant stone tower visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy meadow with scattered trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through tall grass toward a distant wooden farmhouse

entered.detail: rustic wooden house with thatched roof on a grassy hill
winding dirt trail through tall grass
tall green grass swaying in the wind covering the ground
green leafy trees scattered across the meadow

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through an open meadow with tall grass swaying in the wind. A wooden farmhouse sits ahead on a slight rise, with a dirt path winding through the grass. The sky is bright blue with scattered white clouds.

events.description: wooden farmhouse passes out of view behind on the left side
lake water becomes visible through trees on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path as the terrain becomes more wooded and rocky

entered.detail: blue lake water visible through gaps in the tree line
tall dense deciduous trees closing in around the path
decaying logs and rocks beside the trail

segments.scene_description: The path leads past the farmhouse and into a more densely vegetated area. Trees close in overhead, creating dappled shade. Through gaps in the foliage on the right, glimpses of a blue lake appear. The terrain becomes rockier with exposed earth and fallen logs.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside forest path with tower overlook

events.description: stone watchtower becomes visible on the left hillside

agents.ego_description: walking along the lakeshore with water visible to the right and a tower ahead on the left

entered.detail: tall stone tower or watchtower on a rocky outcrop
bushes and reeds growing along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The trail follows the lakeshore, with the water now prominently visible through the trees on the right. A stone watchtower appears on a hill to the left. The path winds through dense undergrowth with the lake shimmering blue in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open meadow into a shaded forest that eventually opens up along a shimmering lakeshore. It begins with Geralt walking through tall, swaying grass under a bright blue sky, following a winding dirt path toward a wooden farmhouse on a slight rise. As the camera passes the farmhouse, the landscape shifts into a densely vegetated area where trees close in overhead to create dappled shade and the terrain becomes rockier with fallen logs. The scene then expands as the trail follows the lakeshore, with the blue water becoming prominently visible through the foliage on the right. Finally, the path winds through dense undergrowth, revealing a stone watchtower perched on a distant hill to the left.
